target.title: feat: add profile link to account menu
target.body: ## Summary - add a Profile action above Dashboard in the signed-in account menu - resolve the active user's real personal publisher handle before linking to the public profile - add unit and local-auth browser regression coverage ## Real behavior proof Verified on commit `c6e04637` with the local-auth owner persona: - opened the signed-in avatar menu - confirmed Profile is visible above Dashboard and links to `/user/local` - clicked Profile and reached the Local Owner profile - confirmed no browser runtime errors Raw proof files: https://github.com/fuller-stack-dev/clawhub/tree/qa-artifacts/clawhub-ui-proof/pr-2625/profile-menu-20260612 ## Tests - `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH bun run test:pw:local-auth -- --project=chromium e2e/local-auth/header-profile-link.pw.test.ts --retries=0` (1 passed; includes local Convex deployment and production build) - `bunx vitest run src/__tests__/header.test.tsx convex/publishers.test.ts` (84 passed) - `bun run ci:unit` (3,141 passed, 1 skipped) - `bun run ci:static` - `bunx convex codegen` - `bun run format:check -- src/components/Header.tsx src/__tests__/header.test.tsx convex/publishers.ts convex/publishers.test.ts e2e/local-auth/header-profile-link.pw.test.ts` - `bun run lint` - `bun run deadcode:ci` - `git diff --check` - final fallback autoreview: no accepted/actionable findings ## Known gate issue - `bun run ci:types-build` stops at the existing duplicate React type errors in `src/lib/skillIcon.ts`. The local-auth runner's production build passed.
